function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I could not find canonical project records for either “NORA-at-home” or “attic rainwater rig,” so I can’t determine which started earlier or delete one without guessing. Please provide the exact project folder names/paths to compare.
function.rulebook_notes: Used inbox-processing workflow, treated inbox as non-canonical, checked canonical project lane, and avoided destructive action because target set was not uniquely supported.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing start dates of two specific projects, but canonical project records in 40_projects could not be matched to those names from available evidence. Deletion guidance requires exact target confirmation; without it, proceeding would require guessing.
